title: High-Rate Modbus Exception Responses (Potential DoS)

compliance.assurance_rationale: Auto-migrated from cat-22 markdown on Phase 1.3 run, then normalised in Phase A (clause 'IEC 62443-4-2 / CR 6.1' → 'CR 6.1'). Requires SME review to confirm clause accuracy, mode (satisfies vs detects-violation-of), and assurance level (contributing/partial/full).

spl:
index=ot_protocol sourcetype="edge_hub_modbus" isnotnull(exception_code) earliest=-4h
| bin _time span=1m
| stats count by _time, dest_plc, src_ip, exception_code
| where count>500
| sort - count
value: Detects exception storms targeting PLCs that may indicate denial-of-service attacks against control I/O.
implementation: (1) Rate-limit at gateway; (2) ACL offending IP; (3) correlate with IDS; (4) verify PLC CPU load via vendor API.
knownFalsePositives: Administrative tasks, scheduled jobs or platform updates can match this pattern — correlate with change management, maintenance windows and user role before raising severity.
